entries.result: You - spook a horse as you run by it and it lashes out  with a heavy kick. Make a DC 12 Dexterity saving  throw or take 8 (2d4 + 3) bludgeoning damage.

The - load on a vehicule  full of liqudis  comes loose and  begins to roll down the street. Make a DC 11 Strength  (Athletics) or Dexterity (Acrobatics) check to avoid  the tumbling barrels. On a failed check, take 2 (1d4)  bludgeoning damage and fall prone.

You - come across a crowded marketplace full of  people who block your path and bump into you  as you run. Make a DC 12 Strength (Athletics) or  Dexterity (Acrobatics) check. On a failed save, the  crowd counts as difficult terrain. Fail by 5 or more  and you are grappled.

A - fried food vendor suddenly pushes their cart into  your path. Make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw. On  a failed save, you get splashed with hot oil, suffering  4 (1d6 + 1) fire damage on this round and the next.
Make - a DC 14 Wisdom (Perception) check. On a  success, you notice a large pile of ox dung directly  in your path. On a failure, you hit it at full speed,  slipping and falling prone.

In - a wide square, a boisterous festival is in full  swing. A group of 12 goblins stand on each other’s  shoulders juggling sharp knives. Make a DC 14  Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, you take 4  (1d8) slashing damage.

A - group of street urchins tries to surround you.  Make a DC 12 Strength (Athletics) or Dexterity  (Acrobatics) check to push by them. On a failed  save, they count as 15 feet of difficult terrain. Fail  by 5 or more and they steal 16 (3d10) coins from  your purse.

A - patrol of city guards, now very interested in  what you are doing, try to stop you. Make a DC  15 Strength (Athletics), Dexterity (Acrobatics) or  Charisma (Persuasion) check. On a failure, they  restrain you.

You - round a corner right into a large cart selling  glass vases, cups and pitchers. Make a DC 14  Dexterity (Acrobatics) check. On a failure, you crash  through the cart, suffering 3 (1d4 + 1) piercing  damage and falling prone.

A - choir of children precedes a large religious parade  that fills the streets in both directions. Make a DC 12  Strength (Athletics) or Dexterity (Acrobatics) check  to push your way through. On a failure, your path is  blocked for two rounds.

Make - a DC 13 Wisdom (Perception) check. On a  successful check, you notice an open manhole  in your path. On a failure, you fall through into  the sewers and into fetid water, taking 3 (1d6)  bludgeoning damage. If you fall, make a DC 12  Constitution saving throw or become poisoned.
Church - of Atom Propaganda Pamphlet (“When the River Glows Green”)
A - radio that only picks up one station (a man reading from The New Testament of The Last Son)
A - handmade holy symbol of the Last Son (matching Brother Landon – The Train Job)
Pristine - white robes with a green sun embroidered on the breast
Defaced - Church of Atom Propaganda Pamphlet (“Catch A Shining Star and Put It In Your Pocket”)

tables.title: Random Ammunition
tables.description: * Scavenger perk: only +1CD per rank additional Missiles. ** Scavenger perk: no additional Fusion Cores or Mini-Nukes.

tables.title: Random Armor
tables.description: Power Armor Frames do not come with a fusion core. Some armor pieces require a hit-location roll.

tables.title: Foraging
tables.description: Used for gathering food from wild plants while in the wasteland.

tables.title: Nuka-Cola Machine
tables.description: Roll twice when a Nuka-Cola machine is found while scavenging.

entries.result: 1+2CD glass bottles (junk; scavenge for 2 common materials each)

tables.title: Random Ranged Weapons
tables.description: Ranged weapons found come with a standard quantity of their ammunition.

entries.result: Institute Laser Rifle (Long Barrel, Standard Stock)
Pipe Bolt Action Rifle (Long Barrel, Standard Stock)
Scoped Hunting Rifle (Long Barrel, Short Scope)

tables.title: Random Thrown and Explosive Weapons
tables.description: Items are found in the listed quantity.

tables.title: Junk
tables.description: When junk is found while scavenging, roll 2d20 for the quantity. Salvaging takes 10 minutes per item and an INT + Repair test difficulty 0; roll 1CD per junk item for common materials, +1CD per AP spent. Scrapper adds uncommon/rare materials as described in the survival rules.

entries.result: Roll result = number of junk items found. Each junk item has Weight 2 and Value 2 caps; it may be salvaged for materials with an INT + Repair test.
